failure_reason: Admitted token-band to the fourth-arm manifest at verdict 3. The TOKEN blueprint reservation now lives inside token.fk's module body, so fkwu's table execution reaches the recipe verdict instead of the module-level reservation. Token fixed-position accessors use direct head/tail projections and the test builds the tampered token through those accessors. Full Form validation reports 147 four-way bands with 565 ok and 0 divergent. The metal-plane audit passes Form-native CPU/GPU/ML, lowered JIT, macOS arm64 Mach-O receipts, and Android arm64 ELF receipts.
